Quote: # my_quotes_example.csv
# Example CSV quote file for Quote Screensaver.
# FORMAT RULES:
#   • First row must be the header:  Quote
Author: Author

Quote: #   • One quote per row after the header.
#   • Wrap fields in "double quotes" if they contain commas or line breaks.
#   • To include a literal " inside a quoted field
Author: write it as "".

Quote: #   • Leave the Author cell empty to show the quote without attribution.
#   • Lines starting with # are treated as comments and ignored.
#   • Save the file as UTF-8 for best results.
# See docs/QUOTE_FORMATS.md for the full format reference.
I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
Author: Philippians 4:13

Quote: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans for welfare and not for evil, to give you a future and a hope.
Author: Jeremiah 29:11

Quote: Fear not, for I am with you; be not dismayed, for I am your God; I will strengthen you, I will help you.
Author: Isaiah 41:10

Quote: Trust in the Lord with all your heart, and do not lean on your own understanding.
Author: Proverbs 3:5

Quote: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
Author: Psalm 23:1

Quote: For God so loved the world that he gave his only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish but have eternal life.
Author: John 3:16

Quote: Not all of us can do great things. But we can do small things with great love.
Author: St. Teresa of Calcutta

Quote: Pray as though everything depended on God. Work as though everything depended on you.
Author: St. Augustine

Quote: Faith is to believe what you do not see. The reward of faith is to see what you believe.
Author: St. Augustine

Quote: Joy is a net of love by which you can catch souls.
Author: St. Teresa of Calcutta

Quote: To have courage for whatever comes in life — everything lies in that.
Author: St. Teresa of Ávila

Quote: A humble soul does not trust itself, but places all its confidence in God.
Author: St. Faustina Kowalska

When I was young, I admired clever people. Now that I am old, I admire kind people.
Author: Abraham Joshua Heschel

Quote: He said to them, "Come, follow me."
Author: Matthew 4:19

Quote: Quote with no author at all
